title: Cron system

The '''Cron system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Auril sector/Legends|Auril sector]]. During the [[Old Republic era]], it contained the [[Kemplex Nine]] [[Space station/Legends|jump station]] and a [[Cron Cluster/Legends|cluster]] of ten [[Star/Legends|stars]]. It was [[Cron Supernova/Legends|destroyed]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] [[Battle of Kemplex Nine|through]] the [[Supernova (Sith magic)|designs]] of [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] [[Sith sorcerer|sorceress]] [[Aleema Keto]], and the result was the creation of the [[Cron Drift/Legends|Cron Drift]].
